summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PRs. No merge action is recommended because the hydrated artifact does not contain a complete merge preflight with Codex /review proof, resolved bot-review proof, and known mergeability. Four PRs are kept as independent maintainer-ready candidates; #86233 is routed to maintainer judgment because the artifact marks it as a large compatibility-risk change.
